verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Live in me Lord, live in me, Open your word, Lord, reveal to me The Life of Jesus is all I see The Seventh Seal has set me free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Live in me Lord, live in me, Here's my heart Lord, let it be Consecrated Lord to thee Take my life Lord, live in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah, I am free Christ has given liberty Seven Thunders is the key Hallelujah, Christ in me
